name: CompanyEnrich
description: Retrieve current firmographic, financial, location, technology, workforce, and social data for a business domain.

auth.hint: Create an account, generate an API token in the CompanyEnrich dashboard, and send it as a Bearer token.

tools.name: enrich_company
tools.description: Enrich one company by its domain name.

params.name: domain
params.description: Company domain, with a maximum length of 1024 characters.
